{
    "cli": "edq.cli.config.unset",
    "setup_funcs": [
        "edq.testing.cli.create_directory_structure",
    ],
    "teardown_funcs": [
        "edq.config.testing.verify_cli_test_config_content",
    ],
    "arguments": [
        "user",
        "--project",
    ],
    "work_dir": "__TEMP_DIR__()",
    "extra_options": {
        "directory_structure": [
            ["edq-config.json", {
                "user": "user@test.edulinq.org",
                "pass": "password1234",
            }],
        ],
        "path": "edq-config.json",
        "data": {
            "pass": "password1234",
        },
    },
}
---
Unset config option ('user') from: '__TEMP_DIR__(edq-config.json)'.
